title: Solutions of nonlinear Sobolev-Burgers PDEs
summary:
Nonlinear Sobolev-Burgers PDEs are considered. Their solutions are
investigated. A technique of noncommutative line integration is utilized for
their description. A new method of PDEs solution with the help of
Cayley-Dickson algebras is developed in the article. Moreover, random operator
valued measures are studied and applied to solutions of PDEs.
